_comment: PLACEHOLDER — Replace this file with your actual google-services.json from Firebase Console.
_instructions: 2. Create a new project (or open an existing one)
3. Add an Android app with package name: com.prawwplus.mobile
4. Download the google-services.json and replace this file
5. For iOS: download the GoogleService-Info.plist and place it at ios/PRawwPlus/GoogleService-Info.plist
6. Set FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID, FIREBASE_CLIENT_EMAIL, FIREBASE_PRIVATE_KEY env vars on the backend for FCM HTTP v1 API
